title: Admin Usage Stats for Integrations filter by App
excerpt: It would be very helpful to be able to filter the usage stats for integrations by app. Many of the apps plans are based on the number of uses per month, so to be able to accurately determine if we have the right size pla…

posts.author: katiemc (Katie McAuliffe)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful to be able to filter the usage stats for integrations by app. Many of the apps plans are based on the number of uses per month, so to be able to accurately determine if we have the right size plan it would be very useful to be able see our real usage data.
